name: Suspicious RUN Key from Download Detected
description: Detects the creation of a suspicious RUN key by a process running from a Download or temporary Internet directory. Adversaries often use this technique to establish persistence by ensuring their malicious code is executed automatically at startup.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a process, **{image}**, running from a temporary or download directory, created a suspicious **RUN key**. The target object is **{target_object}**. This is a strong indicator of **Persistence** and **Privilege Escalation** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1547.001**) where an adversary is attempting to establish a foothold by ensuring their malicious code is executed at startup. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious entry from the registry. The event occurred with Event ID **13** under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The process image that created the RUN key.

parameters.name: target_object
parameters.description: The full path of the registry key that was created.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
